facebook.caption:
524 reviews for a grocery store. In Phu Quoc. That tells you everything.

Kingkong Mart on Đường Bạch Đằng is where you stock up on snacks, sunscreen, cold drinks, and anything you forgot to pack. Rated 4.3★ by over 500 real shoppers. No resort markup. No hassle.

First stop after landing. Smart move.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into Kingkong Mart for the first time. Cold drinks, local snacks, travel essentials. 4.3★ across 524 reviews. Your resort mini-bar does not want you to know this place exists.
